## Summary

-

## Checks

- [ ] `corepack pnpm lint`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm test`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm build`

## Preview

- [ ] Local preview checked with `corepack pnpm dev`
- [ ] Preview URL or screenshot added when UI behavior changed

## Data And Secrets

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, cookies, or private nutrition data were committed
- [ ] Supabase schema or env changes are documented, if applicable
- [ ] New dependencies are explained, if applicable
